topic: There is a room in my house that only appears in the mirror
title: There Is a Room in My House That Only Appears in the Hallway Mirror | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a door in my hallway mirror that does not exist in my hallway.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a large oval hallway mirror in a wood frame mounted on a wall, the reflection inside showing the same hallway but with an extra wooden door visible at the far end, dim warm sconce light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Nineteen forties farmhouse. Inherited from my aunt. Two years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a two story white wood farmhouse at dusk, a wraparound porch and a tin roof, an overgrown front yard, no people, soft grey evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The mirror came with the house. Bolted to the wall. We left it.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a long narrow hallway with floral wallpaper, a large oval mirror in an ornate dark wood frame mounted at the far end, a small console table beneath it, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First winter I noticed the door in the reflection.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the oval hallway mirror, the reflection showing the same hallway floor and walls but with an extra closed wooden door visible at the end of the corridor, dim hallway lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same hallway in the reflection. One extra door at the end.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a hallway taken from the perspective of the mirror's reflection, showing the corridor extending to a closed wooden door at the far end, no person visible, soft ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked the hallway. Counted the doors. Three. Reflection shows four.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand pointing at the surface of the oval mirror, the reflection showing four doors lining the corridor, the actual hallway visible at the edge of the frame with only three doors, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The extra door has a brass knob. The others are silver.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of the mirror surface showing the reflection of an ornate brass doorknob on a closed wooden door, the grain of the wood visible, dim ambient hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last March it opened in the reflection. Just a crack.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the oval hallway mirror, the reflection showing the extra wooden door at the far end now slightly ajar, a sliver of darkness visible inside the room beyond, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I could see a chair inside. A coat draped over it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the mirror reflection through the cracked open door, showing a darkened room interior with a single wooden chair near the doorway, a dark wool coat draped over the back of the chair, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I covered the mirror with a bedsheet. Slept downstairs that night.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of the hallway at night, the oval mirror at the end fully covered with a white bedsheet pinned at the corners, dim moonlight through a side window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: When I pulled the sheet down in the morning the door was wide open.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the oval mirror in morning light, a crumpled white bedsheet on the floor below it, the reflection showing the extra door now standing wide open at the end of the hallway, the room beyond mostly dark, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The chair is empty now. The coat is gone. I have not seen the man yet.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the mirror reflection through the wide open door, showing the same darkened room with the wooden chair empty, no coat on it, the room interior dim and indistinct, vertical 9:16 framing
